title: Prism Dependency v1
description: Describes a single upstream contract or proof that a prism artifact depends on, including optional Dead-Ledger proof linkage.

id.description: Stable identifier of the dependency, e.g., regionContractCard id, policyEnvelope id, proofEnvelope id.

repo.description: Optional repository where the dependency resides (org/repo or VM-node id).

path.description: Optional file path of the dependency within the repo.

schemaRef.description: Optional schema reference describing the dependency payload.

deadledgerProof.description: When authoring rules require a Dead-Ledger proof for this dependency, this block links to the proof envelope.

required.description: True if the target repo's authoring rules require a Dead-Ledger proof for this dependency.

proofEnvelopeId.description: Identifier of the proof envelope in Dead-Ledger, if known.

verifierRef.description: Reference to a verifier descriptor (e.g., entry in a verifiers registry).

circuitType.description: Logical circuit type used for this proof (e.g., 'age-gate', 'entitlement', 'integrity').
